expectations.text: The decision marks the skill as applicable.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "applicable": true,
  "agent_type": "code-review",
  "model_tier": "standard",
  "model": "gpt-4.1",
  "justification": "Reviewing a 35-file architectural diff requires standard-tier reasoning, and since the first-choice gpt-5.4 is unavailable, we fall back to another standard-tier model.",
  "fallback_strategy": "Stay in the standard tier and use the next cheapest available standard-tier model."
}
